name: Passion Fruit Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in cold water.
2. Whisk the chilled evaporated milk with an electric beater until firm and foamy.
3. Add sugar to the whipped milk and beat for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the passion fruit juice and gelatin mixture.
5. Pour into an oiled mold and chill for at least 6 hours.
6. Unmold and serve with a passion fruit sauce.
You can make this recipe using coconut cream, strawberries, or any other fruit of your choice. For a milk shake, combine:
1 cup milk
Sweetener (as desired)
Vanilla extract (a few drops)
Ice cubes
Blend all ingredients until smooth. Optionally, add cocoa powder for extra flavor if permitted and sugar-free.
